summary: Focused Vitest coverage and full frontend test/typecheck validation confirmed the waveform renders only during recording and remains hidden before start and after stop without footer toggle regressions.

evidence: src/components/BottomBar.test.tsx verifies the waveform renders for phase="recording".
src/App.toggle.test.tsx verifies the waveform is absent before start, becomes visible after the normal mic toggle starts recording, and the stop control remains aria-pressed while active.
scenarios.expected_result: The waveform bar is visible only after recording starts

evidence: src/components/BottomBar.test.tsx verifies the waveform is hidden for idle, requesting-mic, and processing phases.
src/App.toggle.test.tsx verifies the waveform disappears after stop and the footer transitions into processing without a broken mic-toggle flow.
scenarios.expected_result: The waveform bar is hidden as soon as recording stops and remains hidden outside the recording phase

commands: cd frontend && pnpm exec vitest run src/components/BottomBar.test.tsx src/App.toggle.test.tsx
notes: Validation was completed through existing repository test coverage rather than a live browser session.
No transcript layout or mic-toggle regression was observed in the record/stop test path.
